summary: buildNetWorth errors out when primaryCurrency is empty instead of silently returning a near-zero total.
reason: loadPrimaryCurrency returns ("", nil) when the profile resource has not been synced. The downstream netWorthBalance inBase check then never fires for same-currency manual accounts, so result.Total only picks up foreign-currency Plaid accounts with to_base set. The total looked wrong with no signal to the user. Surface the missing sync as a clear error directing the user to run sync. Closes Greptile fifth re-review P1 on PR #624.
